toggles.description: Vulkan spec gap: staging buffer for compressed tex-to-tex with non-block-aligned extents (crbug.com/dawn/42)
Intel Gen9/Gen11 D3D12 CopyTextureRegion bug for small-format mip copies (crbug.com/1161355)
D3D12 depth-stencil copy restriction without programmable MSAA (crbug.com/dawn/727)
D3D12 cross-dimension texture copy not natively supported (crbug.com/dawn/1216)
Intel Metal: render to temp texture for R8/RG8 unorm small mips (level >= 2) (crbug.com/dawn/1071)
treat cooperative matrix stride as matrix elements instead of pointee elements (Mali workaround)
disable sub-allocation for buffers and textures
use D3D12 render pass API when available
use DXC compiler instead of FXC for HLSL
replace workgroup bool with u32 in MSL for Mac AMD/Intel
